message:
docs(extensions): add catalog, API matrix, and priority analysis JSONs

Generated analysis documents for the extension conformance corpus:

- extension-catalog.json (pi.ext.catalog.v1): indexes all 60 extensions
  with source tier (small/medium/large), runtime classification
  (legacy-js=51, multi-file=4, pkg-with-deps=5), and provenance info
- extension-api-matrix.json (pi.ext.api-matrix.v1): maps each extension
  to its registration types, hostcall usage, required capabilities,
  event subscriptions, and Node API dependencies (crypto, fs, os, path,
  process) for compatibility scanner input
- extension-priority.json (pi.ext.priority.v1): ranks all 60 extensions
  by testability — first 25 are testable with minimal infrastructure
  (simple tools, event hooks, slash commands), last 25 require advanced
  mocks, UI overlays, provider shims, or npm dependencies
- extension-master-catalog.json (pi.ext.master-catalog.v1): comprehensive
  consolidated catalog of all artifact sources for conformance testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,1036 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.ext.priority.v1",
+  "generated_at": "2026-02-05T06:38:00Z",
+  "total": 60,
+  "first_25_summary": "Testable with minimal infrastructure (simple tools, event hooks, slash commands)",
+  "last_25_summary": "Requires advanced mocks, UI overlays, provider shims, or npm dependencies",
+  "rankings": [
+    {
+      "rank": 1,
+      "id": "git-checkpoint",
+      "score": 34,
+      "complexity": "small",
+      "runtime_tier": "legacy-js",
+      "registration_types": [],
